title: codereview-P3: log reader full file load
description: P3: scripts/analyze-hetero-fleet.py:53,82,128,172 use read_text() loading full (potentially multi-GB) log into memory before splitlines(). Risks OOM on large fleet tests. Fix: refactor parse_*_logs to stream with  . Update parse_telemetry to accept iterable[str]. Merge duplicate TX/RX parsing logic into shared helper to reduce code duplication (current 3 near-identical blocks). Add large-log test that generates 100MB+ file and verifies no >50MB peak memory. Follows 'no dead code' and streaming patterns from other scripts. After fix run 3 codereviews.
close_reason: Completed per above; memory test passes.
